channel.title: Androscoggin County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. No news section; monitors hours/fee/contact content.

item.title: Page updated: Androscoggin County Registry of Deeds
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + Board of Visitors Annual Reports
